column5: Concrete Slab with cobbles and gravels of moderately decomposed granite and steel bars. (PILL)

Strong, pinkly grey spotted black and white, slightly decomposed medium to coarse-grained GRANITE with widely to medium spaced, rough planar, limonite, manganese stained joints, and minor infill joints, dipping 10"+20", 70"+85"
Moderately strong, pinkly grey spotted black and white, moderately decomposed medium to coarse-grained GRANITE.
